title: Cochin Shipyard – Rigger – 40 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Cochin Shipyard Rigger Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard Recruitment 2026 for 40 posts of Rigger. Candidates with 8th Pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 06-05-2026, and closes on 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Cochin Shipyard official website cochinshipyard.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in VIII Std. (Graduates/Diploma holders not eligible)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Cochin Shipyard to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
